creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
- Updated again now to 1.18.248
- Backup Master-Site removed
- Maintainer inactive?

kind regards Dirk

- Dirk Meyer, Im Grund 4, 34317 Habichtswald, Germany

diff zircon/Makefile zircon-1.18.248/Makefile
--- zircon/Makefile	Mon Dec 11 03:43:12 2000
+++ zircon-1.18.248/Makefile	Sat Mar 17 12:43:59 2001
@@ -6,10 +6,9 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	zircon
-PORTVERSION=	1.18.245
+PORTVERSION=	1.18.248
 CATEGORIES=	irc tk82
-MASTER_SITES=	ftp://catless.ncl.ac.uk/pub/ \
-		ftp://ftp.lan-ks.de/pub/FreeBSD/distfiles/
+MASTER_SITES=	ftp://catless.ncl.ac.uk/pub/
 
 MAINTAINER=	jseger@FreeBSD.org
 
diff zircon/distinfo zircon-1.18.248/distinfo
--- zircon/distinfo	Mon Dec 11 03:43:12 2000
+++ zircon-1.18.248/distinfo	Tue Mar  6 07:04:58 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (zircon-1.18.245.tar.gz) = ba5211b1a79770b3649b1dd1342b780d
+MD5 (zircon-1.18.248.tar.gz) = 8d2b197042561f91c615542a42b56ede
